required_symptom_questions: How long have you been experiencing vision changes?
Is the issue in one eye or both?
Do you experience headaches associated with your vision?
Any family history of glaucoma or macular degeneration?
Do you have difficulty with near vision, distant vision, or both?

required_documents.label: Previous glasses or contact lens prescription
required_documents.description: Your most recent eyewear prescription if you have one

required_documents.label: Previous eye examination report
required_documents.description: Any prior eye exam results or specialist reports

required_symptom_questions: Is there sudden vision loss or significant blurring?
Any eye pain, redness, or discharge?
Any recent eye injury or chemical exposure?
